metadata.Plot: A retired teacher and a very succesful female banker meets at a holiday resort incidentally. The woman is sick and tired of her workload/housework and his husband while the man has escaped from his monotonous lifestyle. He is up to settle in a village nearby where he thinks he will live his dream in solitude. While looking for a place to rent, they get close and fall in love with each other. But their lifestyles and characters are quite different...
metadata.Writer: Erhan Bener, Mahinur Ergun, Atif Yilmaz
metadata.Actors: Türkan Soray, Rutkay Aziz, Turgay Betil
